title: lastrea velutina
intro: Lastrea velutina, also known as the velvet fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea velutina include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Lastrea velutina include treating bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as providing relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Lastrea velutina is often dried and used in tea or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
